CONTRACT TYPE: Firm Fixed Price (FFP)

This is a competitive, 8(a) small business set-aside conducted in accordance with the Federal Acquisition Regulation (FAR) parts 12 and 15.

Berg-Liles Dining Facility (Main Dining Facility), Bldg 1690, Tyndall AFB, FL

Start: 01 Oct 2026
